personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Responsible for generating realistic AI news briefings for each genre.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Responsible for delivering the realistic news videos to users within the active 2-hour window.

flows.flow_name: generate realistic news briefings for each genre
actions: Retrieve teacher avatar IDs using the API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Science, AI, Weather) and save the mapping.
For each genre, fetch the latest headlines using Google search queries and generate a short narration script in news anchor style with current timestamp.
Generate one realistic AI video per script using assigned avatar; save conv_id with status pending.
Check video generation status every minute using API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} and update status to success upon completion.
Store all 7 videos under respective conv_id with metadata including genre, avatar, video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp (+2 hours).
Schedule flow execution every two hours, track each story using metadata timestamps, and manage information contextually.
flows.sub_goal: creation of realistic presynthesized AI news briefings

flows.flow_name: Deliver the realistic news Videos to User from the successful meta data records in Active 2-Hour Window
actions: Check and get the list of conv_id with status marked as success by comparing current timestamp against script timestamp.
If conv_id list is not empty, fetch the 7 pre-generated videos linked to conv_id along with assigned avatars.
Publish each video to the user sequentially using conv_id; save list of conv_id in metadata against played_news_user_id key.
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 7-genre video set for users within the current 2-hour cycle based on expiry time-stamp
